Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/tech-matrix.json''\); console.log\(''Sections:'', d.sections.length\); let total = 0; d.sections.forEach\(s => { const c = s.topics.reduce\(\(sum, t\) => sum + t.jun.length + t.mid.length + t.sen.length, 0\); total += c; console.log\('' -'', s.id, s.title, ''\('' + s.topics.length + '' topics,'', c, ''skills\)''\); }\); console.log\(''Total skills:'', total\);")
